name: (WLW) You Are Today's Public Fucktoy
description:

You will be laid on your back and bound by rope in the middle of the town square, and any woman is allowed to grope, molest, kiss, finger, and fuck you as much as they want. Will you be able to survive 24 hours of ravenous lesbian sex?
